I'm a backend developer with a strong foundation in building RESTful APIs, authentication systems, and database-driven applications. I bridge the gap between technical complexity and clean, maintainable code.

Currently interning at Zodiac Techlance while pursuing my B.E. in Information Technology at SAL College of Engineering. I'm passionate about server-side logic and creating backend systems that scale.
